title: Unit Circle Values for Sine
text: Recall the angles on the unit circle where the y-coordinate (sine value) is positive $$\frac{1}{2}$$.

title: General Solutions for Sine
text: Remember that sine has a period of $$2\pi$$. If $$t$$ is a solution, then $$t$$ + $$2\pi$$ $$k$$ is also a solution for any integer k.
